question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Tell the build Up play passing class for "FC Lorient" on 2010/2/22. "FC Lorient" refers to team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'; on 2010/2/22 refers to date LIKE '2010-02-22%';
orig_masked: Tell the [C178] for "[V2]" on [V3]. "[V2]" refers to [C173] = '[V2]'; on [V3] refers to [C189] LIKE '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C189]; [V2] is a value of the column [C173]; [V3] is a value of the column [C189]
orig_evidence: "FC Lorient" refers to team_long_name = 'FC Lorient'; on 2010/2/22 refers to date LIKE '2010-02-22%';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.buildUpPlayPassingClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'FC Lorient' AND t2.`date` LIKE '2010-02-22%'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Which of these players performs the best in crossing actions, Alexis, Ariel Borysiuk or Arouna Kone? player who perform best in crossing actions refers to MAX(crossing);
orig_masked: Which of these [T4] [C134], [V3], [V1] or [V2]? [T4] who perform best in [C134] actions refers to MAX([C134]);; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]; [V2] is a value of the column [C126]; [V3] is a value of the column [C126]
orig_evidence: player who perform best in crossing actions refers to MAX(crossing);
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t1.player_name, t2.crossing FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t1.player_name IN ('Alexis', 'Ariel Borysiuk', 'Arouna Kone') ORDER BY t2.crossing DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Please list all team names which the speed class is fast. team names refers to team_long_name; speed class refers to buildUpPlaySpeedClass; buildUpPlaySpeedClass = 'Fast';
orig_masked: Please list all [C173] which the [C181] is [V1]. [C173] refers to [C173]; [C181] refers to [C181]; [C181] = '[V1]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C181]
orig_evidence: team names refers to team_long_name; speed class refers to buildUpPlaySpeedClass; buildUpPlaySpeedClass = 'Fast';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT t1.team_long_name FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t2.buildUpPlaySpeedClass = 'Fast'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: For the patient who has the highest Ig A within the normal range, what is his or her diagnosis? highest Ig A within the normal range refers to MAX(IGA BETWEEN 80 AND 500);
orig_masked: For the [T3] who has the [C33] [C33] [C33], what is his or her [C61]? [C33] [C33] [C33] refers to MAX([C33] BETWEEN [V2] AND [V1]);; [V1] is a value of the column [C33]; [V2] is a value of the column [C33]
orig_evidence: highest Ig A within the normal range refers to MAX(IGA BETWEEN 80 AND 500);
orig_gold_sql: SELECT patientData.Diagnosis FROM Patient AS patientData INNER JOIN Laboratory AS labData ON patientData.ID = labData.ID WHERE labData.IGA BETWEEN 80 AND 500 ORDER BY labData.IGA DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the gender of the oldest client who opened his/her account in the highest average salary branch? Earlier birthdate refers to older age; A11 refers to average salary
orig_masked: What is the [C12] of the [C9] [T3] who [T3] his/her [T3] in the highest average [C18] [T5]? Earlier [C9] refers to [C9] [C9]; [C18] refers to average [C18]
orig_evidence: Earlier birthdate refers to older age; A11 refers to average salary
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.gender FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id ORDER BY T1.A11 DESC, T2.birth_date ASC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: Name the account numbers of female clients who are oldest and have lowest average salary?  Female refers to 'F' in the gender; A11 contains information about average salary
orig_masked: Name the [C1] of [C12] [T3] who are [C9] and have lowest [C18]?  [C12] refers to '[V1]' in the [C12]; [C18] contains information about [C18]; [V1] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_evidence: Female refers to 'F' in the gender; A11 contains information about average salary
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.account_id FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id INNER JOIN account AS T3 ON T2.district_id = T3.district_id INNER JOIN disp AS T4 ON T1.client_id = T4.client_id AND T4.account_id = T3.account_id  WHERE T1.gender = 'F' ORDER BY T1.birth_date ASC, T2.A11 ASC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: What is the highest total bilirubin level recorded? List out the patient details with ID, sex and birthday with that index. the highest total bilirubin refers to MAX(T-BIL)
orig_masked: What is the highest [C48] recorded? List out the [T3] details with [C63], [C64] and [C59] with that index. the highest [C48] refers to MAX([C48])
orig_evidence: the highest total bilirubin refers to MAX(T-BIL)
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.`T-BIL`, T1.ID, T1.SEX, T1.Birthday FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID ORDER BY T2.`T-BIL` DESC LIMIT 1

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: How was Francesco Migliore's attacking work rate on 2015/5/1? Francesco Migliore refers to player_name = 'Francesco Migliore'; on 2015/5/1 refers to date LIKE '2015-05-01%';
orig_masked: How was [V1]'s [C131] on [V3]? [V1] refers to [C126] = '[V1]'; on [V3] refers to [C136] LIKE '[V2]';; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]; [V2] is a value of the column [C136]; [V3] is a value of the column [C136]
orig_evidence: Francesco Migliore refers to player_name = 'Francesco Migliore'; on 2015/5/1 refers to date LIKE '2015-05-01%';
orig_gold_sql: SELECT t2.attacking_work_rate FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id WHERE t2.`date` LIKE '2015-05-01%' AND t1.player_name = 'Francesco Migliore'

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: List the top nine districts, by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the number of female account holders.  A2 refers to districts; Female refers to gender = 'F'
orig_masked: List the top nine [T5], by descending order, from the highest to the lowest, the number of [C12] [T3].  [C24] refers to [T5]; [C12] refers to [C12] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C12]
orig_evidence: A2 refers to districts; Female refers to gender = 'F'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T2.A2, COUNT(T1.client_id) FROM client AS T1 INNER JOIN district AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id WHERE T1.gender = 'F' GROUP BY T2.district_id, T2.A2 ORDER BY COUNT(T1.client_id) DESC LIMIT 9

question: <QUESTION>
orig_question: In 1996, which districts have the highest unemployment rate? List their branch location and district name.  A2 refers to district names; A13 refers to unemploymant rate in 1996
orig_masked: In [C20], which [T5] have the highest [C20]? List their [C24] and [C32].  [C24] refers to [T5] names; [C20] refers to [C20]
orig_evidence: A2 refers to district names; A13 refers to unemploymant rate in 1996
orig_gold_sql: SELECT district_id, A2 FROM district ORDER BY A13 DESC LIMIT 1
